mapper.select: SELECT * FROM specifications WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO specifications (project_id, color, size, tightness, temperature_range, performance) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{color}, #{size}, #{tightness}, #{temperatureRange}, #{performance})
mapper.update: UPDATE specifications SET project_id = #{projectId}, color = #{color}, size = #{size}, tightness = #{tightness}, temperature_range = #{temperatureRange}, performance = #{performance} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT color FROM specifications WHERE color IS NOT NULL AND color != '' ORDER BY color
SELECT DISTINCT size FROM specifications WHERE size IS NOT NULL AND size != '' ORDER BY size
SELECT DISTINCT tightness FROM specifications WHERE tightness IS NOT NULL AND tightness != '' ORDER BY tightness
SELECT DISTINCT temperature_range FROM specifications WHERE temperature_range IS NOT NULL AND temperature_range != '' ORDER BY temperature_range
